17.reason: [Error: This condition uses '>' instead of '>='. According to the problem, right child should be greater than or equal to the root, so equal values should go to the right subtree. Using '>' causes equal values to not be inserted, leading to missing leaf nodes like 100.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  The problem states that values greater than or equal to the root go to the right child. The original code used `num > root->num`, which causes duplicate values (like the second 100) to be ignored/not inserted, leading to missing leaf nodes in the output. Changing it to `>=` ensures duplicates are inserted into the right subtree.
